name: momepy (Urban Morphology Measurement)

performance.notes: GeoPandas-backed; graph operations via networkx; city-scale analysis can be slow

agent_readiness.notes: Urban morphology measurement for buildings and street networks. import momepy. gdf['area'] = momepy.Area(gdf).series. gdf['lal'] = momepy.LongestAxisLength(gdf).series. gdf['elongation'] = momepy.Elongation(gdf).series. gdf['coverage_area'] = momepy.CoverageArea(gdf, tessellation).series. tessellation = momepy.morphological_tessellation(gdf). graph = momepy.gdf_to_nx(streets). graph = momepy.closeness_centrality(graph, radius=400). Buildings, blocks, tessellation, street network analysis. City morphology classification.

gotchas: Highly domain-specific — urban morphology and city analysis only
API changed significantly in 0.7+ — older tutorials may not work
Morphological tessellation can fail on complex building geometries
Street network functions require properly cleaned network data
best_when: Urban morphology research (building shape, density, compactness)
Street network centrality analysis at neighborhood scale
OSMnx + momepy pipelines for urban form analysis
avoid_when: When simpler building/area metrics suffice (use shapely directly)
summary: momepy measures urban morphology of buildings and street networks. momepy.Area(gdf).series. momepy.LongestAxisLength(). momepy.Elongation(). morphological_tessellation(). gdf_to_nx(streets) + closeness_centrality(). BSD-3 by Martin Fleischmann/PySAL. Niche tool for urban morphology research. API changed in 0.7+. Best for building shape analysis, city typology, and street network centrality in urban science research.
